case.title: NATIONAL SMALL SHIPMENTS TRAF. v. RINGSBY TRUCK LINES

opinion.h: NATIONAL SMALL SHIPMENTS TRAF. v. RINGSBY TRUCK LINES, 389 U.S. 576 (1968)

NATIONAL SMALL SHIPMENTS TRAFFIC CONFERENCE, INC., ET AL. v. RINGSBY TRUCK LINES, INC., ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLORADO. No. 163. Decided January 15, 1968.
opinion.p: Arthur A. Arsham, John J. C. Martin and Max L. Wymore for appellants.
LeGrand Alf Carlston and Z. L. Pearson, Jr., for appellees.
Solicitor General Griswold, former Solicitor General Marshall and Robert W. Ginnane for the United States et al.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed as moot.
MR. JUSTICE MARSHALL took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
